blocks.text: Tuesday night belongs to Glimt — and Haaland faces Real Madrid

Four all-square second legs on Tuesday — the richest CL night of the round. Bodo/Glimt's aggregate parity in Lisbon is a historic Norwegian club moment. Arsenal, nine points clear at the top, host Leverkusen at a packed Emirates.

blocks.label: Also Tuesday 21:00 — CL Second Legs
items: ⚽ Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen — Emirates, all-square, winner advances
⚽ Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain — Stamford Bridge, nothing between them

blocks.label: 🏆 CL Wednesday — Anfield & Camp Nou
items: ⚽ Liverpool vs Galatasaray 21:00 — Anfield must roar, Liverpool trail 1-0 on agg
⚽ Barcelona vs Newcastle United 18:45 — winner-takes-all at Camp Nou
⚽ Bayern Munich vs Atalanta 21:00 — formality, Bayern lead 6-1 on agg
